zh.lifeSummary: 當John Jenney於1398年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親William Jenney26歲，母親Maud Gerrard18歲。他和Maud Bokill至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1460年12月3日在英國英格蘭素福爾可享年62歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可可諾迪沙拉爾 煙雨 布可洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Jenney于1398年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲William Jenney26岁，母亲Maud Gerrard18岁。他和Maud Bokill至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1460年12月3日在英国英格兰素福爾可享年62岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可可諾迪沙拉爾 煙雨 布可洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Jenney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German   Jenny  , or perhaps of   Jenne  .

variants.name: Jenny
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Dietrich, Otto.
Swiss German and Alsatian: from a pet form of Jähn, Swiss German and Alsatian form of the personal name Johannes (see John ).
English: from a pet form of the Middle English personal name Jen (from Jehan; see Jean and John ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Jenney was born in 1398, in England, United Kingdom, his father, William Jenney, was 26 and his mother, Maud Gerrard, was 18. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Maud Bokill. He died on 3 December 1460, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Jenney est né en 1398, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Jenney, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Maud Gerrard, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Maud Bokill. Il est décédé le 3 décembre 1460, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Jenney 1398 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Jenney 26 und seine Mutter Maud Gerrard 18. Er hatte mit Maud Bokill mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Dezember 1460 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Jenney è nato il nel 1398 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Jenney, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Maud Gerrard, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Maud Bokill. Morì il 3 dicembre 1460, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, England.

ja.Knoddishall, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクノッドイシャル
ja.lifeSummary: John Jenneyが1398年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父William Jenneyは26歳，母Maud Gerrardは18歳であった。彼はMaud Bokillとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1460年12月3日にイギリスイギリススフォルクで62歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクノディシャル ウィス ブクスロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Jenney(이)가 1398년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Jenney(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Gerrard(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Maud Bokill(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 12월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 노디샤 위스 버스로에 묻혔다.

mn.Knodishall, Suffolk, England: Knoddishall, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Jenney nasceu em 1398, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Jenney, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Maud Gerrard, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Maud Bokill. Ele faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1460, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Jenney родился в 1398 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Jenney было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Gerrard, 18. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Maud Bokill. Он умер 3 декабря 1460 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности нодишолл вит букслоу, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Jenney nació en 1398, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Jenney, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Maud Gerrard, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Maud Bokill. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1460, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Knodishall with Buxlow, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
